overall.description: A nighttime scene from a video game (likely Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a first-person perspective rising from a dead boar carcass on a rural roadside and walking through moonlit grassy fields toward a distant wooden cabin. The footage features high-quality cinematic rendering with cool blue moonlight illuminating the landscape.

events.description: camera rises from ground level next to the carcass to standing height
view opens up from ground level to reveal night sky and grassy landscape

agents.ego_description: rising from the ground next to a dead animal carcass and beginning to walk forward along the roadside

entered.detail: large dark wild boar carcass lying on its side on the gravel ground
rocky dirt and gravel surface of the roadside ditch
unpaved dirt road running parallel to the ditch

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a close-up view of a dead boar carcass lying on gravel at night. The camera rises from ground level, revealing a dirt road to the left and grassy embankment to the right, transitioning from the confined ground view to an open night landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy prairie under full moon

events.description: full moon becomes clearly visible in the night sky, illuminating the landscape
wooden cabin appears on the distant horizon as the camera moves forward

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass in a moonlit field, moving away from the road toward open prairie

entered.detail: tall green grass covering the undulating ground
bright full moon shining through scattered clouds
dark silhouettes of trees on the distant horizon
small rustic wooden structure situated on a hillside

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through an open grassy field under a clear night sky illuminated by a full moon. Scattered trees line the horizon, and a wooden cabin becomes visible in the distance as the camera advances steadily through the tall grass.

events.description: camera begins ascending a gentle slope toward the cabin

agents.ego_description: walking uphill through the grass, steadily approaching the wooden cabin in the distance

entered.detail: dense forest of pine trees forming a dark backdrop behind the cabin
gently sloping hill covered in tall grass leading up to the cabin

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking uphill through the grassy terrain, steadily approaching the wooden cabin which grows larger in the frame. The full moon shifts to the left side of the sky as the camera advances, with a dense pine forest visible behind the cabin.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that rises from a grounded, macabre detail into a vast, moonlit rural landscape. It begins with a close-up of a dead boar carcass on a gravel path, ascending from the ground to reveal a dirt road and a grassy embankment. As the camera advances, the view opens into a wide field of tall grass under a clear night sky, where a distant wooden cabin gradually emerges against a horizon of scattered trees. The scene then shifts as the camera walks steadily uphill, causing the cabin to grow larger in the frame while the full moon drifts toward the left. Finally, the movement culminates in a close approach to the structure, revealing a dense pine forest looming behind the cabin under the cool glow of the moonlight.
